protocol_gates.evidence: 5/5 niches covered: Enterprise/public-sector strategic decision intelligence; Executive and analyst briefing layer; Geopolitical risk radar and scenario monitor; Governed forecasting and research workflow; Negotiation and strategic reasoning training.
10/10 selected targets have a priority substitution test.

8 substitute categories covered: Operational AI platforms; Expert advisory and risk briefings; Internal analyst spreadsheets and memos; Generic LLM copilots; Geopolitical intelligence platforms; Policy and regulatory intelligence platforms; Forecasting services and tournaments; Training, simulations, and workshops.
7 source URLs attached to substitution tests.
0 completed substitution rows found in generated sheet; generated kit must remain execution-ready only.

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: real-time monitoring, alerting, location risk, country-risk scoring, source breadth, and analyst support
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: decision-quality workflow that turns source evidence into actor reasoning, review state, scenario branches, and scoreable follow-up questions
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: raw monitoring coverage or live-intelligence superiority
substitute_catalog.close_question: Would this complement the alerting platform by improving decision briefs, or is alerting coverage the actual buying criterion?

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: enterprise ontology, governed data integration, operational AI workflows, automation, and human-in-the-loop controls
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: narrow, fast guided pilot for strategy/risk teams that do not yet need enterprise ontology deployment
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: Palantir-class enterprise deployment, ontology depth, or scaled operational automation
substitute_catalog.close_question: Would a lightweight pilot be useful before a full enterprise AI platform evaluation, or is integrated operational deployment mandatory from day one?

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: large scored question history, professional forecasters, calibration, benchmark discipline, and custom forecasting services
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: workflow bridge from research evidence to forecast-draft governance and resolved-outcome scoring readiness
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: forecasting parity, world-class accuracy, or benchmark superiority before real resolved outcomes
substitute_catalog.close_question: Is the pain better solved by buying forecasts/training, or by improving the internal workflow that creates and governs forecasts?

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: expert analyst judgment, executive credibility, bespoke briefings, regional depth, and board-ready advisory output
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: repeatable internal workflow for evidence capture, dissent, scenario review, and follow-up scoring between advisory cycles
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: replacement for expert analysts or advisory firms
substitute_catalog.close_question: Would this reduce internal preparation and follow-through around advisory briefings, or is external expert judgment the core purchase?

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: legislative tracking, regulatory intelligence, stakeholder monitoring, and policy workflow integration
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: cross-domain strategic reasoning and forecast governance around policy, geoeconomic, and institutional uncertainty
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: legislative-data coverage, regulatory tracking completeness, or compliance workflow replacement
substitute_catalog.close_question: Is the job legislative tracking, or strategic interpretation and forecast governance around policy uncertainty?

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: low procurement friction, institutional context, analyst control, and existing trust relationships
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: standardized evidence provenance, human review, assumption tracking, scenario structure, and forecast scoring handoff
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: full analyst replacement or autonomous decision authority
substitute_catalog.close_question: Which step is painful enough to justify changing an existing trusted analyst workflow?

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: low-cost general reasoning, drafting, search, and broad familiarity
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: governed decision workflow with explicit evidence, review states, claim boundaries, and forecast-scoring readiness
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: better general intelligence or broad LLM superiority
substitute_catalog.close_question: Does governance and repeatable evidence handling matter enough to move beyond a general LLM prompt workflow?

substitute_catalog.buyer_strength: facilitated learning, behavior change, expert coaching, and stakeholder alignment
substitute_catalog.app_wedge_to_test: repeatable practice environment linking game-tree reasoning, negotiation moves, evidence, and measurable follow-up
substitute_catalog.must_not_claim: replacement for trained facilitators or certified education programs
substitute_catalog.close_question: Would a software-mediated practice loop be adopted between workshops, or is facilitated instruction the whole value?

pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: real-time monitoring, source depth, location and country-risk intelligence
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: turns evidence into actor reasoning, countermoves, human review state, and forecast-draft governance
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not claim better raw intelligence coverage without hosted source/freshness proof

pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: enterprise ontology, operational context, security, and action workflows
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: narrower, faster guided pilot around decision-quality workflow for strategy/risk teams
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not claim full enterprise ontology, private deployment, or scaled integration proof

pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: forecasting communities, training, custom forecasting services, and benchmarkable probability discipline
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: bridges source research, strategist brief, review gates, and governed forecast creation
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not claim world-class accuracy before resolved-outcome and baseline evidence

pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: structured scenario thinking and anticipatory governance
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: operationalizes foresight into evidence bundles, review states, and scoreable follow-up questions
pilot_offer_substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not reduce foresight to single-future prediction
